key_points.location: US - CO, Westminster (Workday canonical). LinkedIn cross-post displayed Lake Oswego, OR per orchestrator; only ONE live req of this title exists in Trimble Workday = Westminster.
key_points.our_fit_analysis: {"verdict": "STRETCH", "yoe_required": "3-5 years (JD: 'Sales Enablement, Product Marketing, or SaaS management with a proven track record of managing people')", "yoe_jamie": "~3 years (bottom of band)", "notes": "Duties (onboarding programs, content/knowledge library, evaluation + analytics, ROI of enablement) map strongly to Jamie's strengths: program management, L&D ops, content/guides, data analytics (InGenius: 20+ programs, 10+ vendors, guides/workflows for 70+ staff, 75% onboarding-time reduction, 600+ participant trainings). Domain framing is sales/SaaS/customer enablement vs Jamie's HR/L&D internal-staff enablement — adjacent/transferable, not identical. 'Managing people' = program leadership, not formal direct reports. Genuine stretch; applying per recalibrated profile rules + orchestrator instruction ('Manager' here = program/content enablement IC-manager sense)."}
key_points.source_note: key points composed from our record fields (no full JD captured; jd_source=none).

fit.yoe_required: 3-5 years (JD: 'Sales Enablement, Product Marketing, or SaaS management with a proven track record of managing people')
fit.notes: Duties (onboarding programs, content/knowledge library, evaluation + analytics, ROI of enablement) map strongly to Jamie's strengths: program management, L&D ops, content/guides, data analytics (InGenius: 20+ programs, 10+ vendors, guides/workflows for 70+ staff, 75% onboarding-time reduction, 600+ participant trainings). Domain framing is sales/SaaS/customer enablement vs Jamie's HR/L&D internal-staff enablement — adjacent/transferable, not identical. 'Managing people' = program leadership, not formal direct reports. Genuine stretch; applying per recalibrated profile rules + orchestrator instruction ('Manager' here = program/content enablement IC-manager sense).
